overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, featuring a character ascending an outdoor escalator past a massive neon advertisement wall, then navigating through urban streets and a red staircase into a dark indoor plaza dominated by a large golden statue.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view ascending an outdoor escalator at night, facing a massive curved wall covered in vibrant neon advertisements and holographic displays. The environment is semi-covered with an overhead concrete structure, and the lighting is dominated by the colorful neon glow of the advertisements.

segments.scene_description: After exiting the escalator, the character turns left onto a street-level walkway bordered by concrete barriers. The neon wall remains visible to the left while the character approaches a red staircase structure at the end of the path. The environment transitions from semi-covered to open street with mixed lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a red-painted staircase with metal railings, moving from the outdoor street into an indoor environment. At the top of the stairs, the character passes through a doorway into a darker interior space, transitioning from mixed outdoor lighting to artificial indoor lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large indoor plaza illuminated by artificial lighting and a circular skylight overhead. The space features a prominent golden statue in the center, concrete benches, vending machines, and digital billboards. The character approaches and passes the statue, continuing through the plaza toward an exit tunnel visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit outdoor ascent into a somber, cavernous indoor plaza. It begins by gliding up an outdoor escalator beneath a concrete overhang, facing a massive curved wall of glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera exits the escalator, it turns left onto a street-level walkway bordered by concrete barriers, moving away from the neon glow toward a red staircase. The scene then shifts as the camera climbs these red stairs and passes through a doorway, transitioning from the mixed lighting of the open street into a darker interior space. Finally, the view opens into a large indoor plaza illuminated by a circular skylight, where the camera passes a prominent golden statue and vending machines while heading toward a distant exit tunnel.
